svg.title: Azure Private VM Lab Architecture
svg.desc: Hub and spoke network diagram showing JumpBox VM in its own subnet with public IP, three private VMs in a separate subnet, with UDR routing internet traffic through the JumpBox via NAT.

g.text: nsg-jumpbox · Allow SSH from home IP · Allow :3142 from VNet · Allow 10.20.1.0/24 (forwarding)
